extDesc.message: Terjemahkan lirik Spotify secara instan ke dalam bahasa Anda secara real-time.

along.message: Tampilkan lirik terjemahan bersama yang asli

toggleTip.message: - 🎵 Aktifkan tombol terjemahan di bilah kontrol pemutar!

deeplEndpointHint.message: Masukkan endpoint yang kompatibel dengan DeepLX (self-hosted atau instance publik — lihat wiki untuk pilihannya).
deeplEndpointHint.description: Hint explaining the DeepLX endpoint field

deeplTestConnection.description: Button to test DeepLX endpoint connection

aiEndpoint.description: Label for AI API endpoint input

aiEndpointHint.description: Hint explaining that /chat/completions is appended to the endpoint URL

aiApiKey.description: Label for AI API key input

aiModel.description: Label for AI model name input

aiTestConnection.description: Button to test AI API connection

aiTestSuccess.description: Success message for AI connection test

aiTestFail.description: Failure message for AI connection test

aiTestInProgress.description: Progress message for AI connection test

aiTranslating.description: Message shown while AI translation is in progress

aiThinkMode.description: Label for AI thinking mode toggle

aiFailover.description: Label for the AI failover toggle

clearSongCache.description: Button to clear the cached translations for the current song

clearAllCache.description: Button to clear all cached translations

clearStorage.description: Debug button to clear all saved extension settings

clearStorageHint.message: Menghapus semua pengaturan tersimpan: bahasa tujuan, mode lirik & ukuran font, penyedia terjemahan, serta endpoint AI, kunci API, model, dan tombol Anda. Ekstensi kembali ke pengaturan default.
clearStorageHint.description: Explanation of what clearing the extension storage removes

confirmClear.description: Confirmation prompt shown on a clear-cache button after the first click
